destinations.title: Destinations
destinations.description: List of destinations to search, e.g. Paris, France or London, United Kingdom.

rooms.title: Number of Rooms
rooms.description: Number of rooms to search for.

propertyTypes.title: Property Type Filters
propertyTypes.description: Optional property type filters. Allowed values: Hotels, Apartments, Hostels, Villas, Resorts, B&Bs, Guest houses. Leave empty for all accommodation types.

minReviewScore.title: Minimum Review Score
minReviewScore.description: Only include properties with a guest review score at or above this threshold.

maxResults.title: Maximum Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of properties to scrape per destination, up to 500.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for scraping. Residential proxy is recommended on Apify.
